summary: PIN Policies System Testing - Iteration 91: All backend API tests passed (16/16). Frontend PIN Policies UI verified working - 23 actions displayed across 9 modules, toggle functionality works, Save Policies button persists changes correctly. verify-manager-pin respects custom policies.

backend_api.GET /api/settings/pin-policies (admin): PASSED - Returns 23 actions, 4 methods, correct policies structure
backend_api.PUT /api/settings/pin-policies (reject e: PASSED - Returns 400 with 'At least one PIN method required'
backend_api.PUT /api/settings/pin-policies (reset wi: PASSED - Clears custom overrides, defaults restored
backend_api.POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin (restr: PASSED - Manager PIN rejected when policy is [admin_pin, totp]
backend_api.POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin (owner: PASSED - Owner PIN (1234) accepted when admin_pin in policy
backend_api.POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin (after: PASSED - Manager PIN works again with default policy
backend_api.POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with a: PASSED - action_key parameter works for void_invoice, daily_close, etc.
backend_api.Actions grouped by module: PASSED - 9 modules: Sales, Fund Management, Reversals, Daily Operations, Inventory, Products, Purchase Orders, Audit, System

frontend_ui.23 action rows displayed: PASSED - UI shows 23 unique action rows
frontend_ui.Toggle functionality: PASSED - Manager PIN toggle changes from blue to white/gray
frontend_ui.Save Policies button: PASSED - data-testid='save-pin-policies-btn' works, shows 'PIN policies saved' toast
frontend_ui.Module groupings: PASSED - SALES, FUND MANAGEMENT, REVERSALS, DAILY OPERATIONS, INVENTORY, PRODUCTS, PURCHASE ORDERS visible
frontend_ui.Method legend: PASSED - Shows Owner PIN, Manager PIN, TOTP, Auditor PIN badges

critical_code_review_comments: PIN Policy system is well-architected: centralized PIN_POLICY_ACTIONS in verify.py with defaults
_resolve_pin accepts allowed_methods parameter for policy-aware verification
verify_pin_for_action helper correctly loads custom policies from DB and falls back to defaults
Frontend UI correctly implements toggle matrix with proper data-testid attributes
All 23 actions properly grouped into 9 logical modules
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN Policies system fully tested. 23 actions across 9 modules: Sales (6), Fund Management (3), Reversals (2), Daily Operations (2), Inventory (1), Products (2), Purchase Orders (1), Audit (4), System (2). verify-manager-pin with action_key parameter respects custom policies.
